name: EGB OE TS.Z./FRESENIUS MED
summary: Fresenius Medical Care AG & Co. KGaA, headquartered in Bad Homburg, Germany, is a global provider of dialysis products and services for patients with chronic kidney failure. The company offers dialysis care services, dialysis machines, dialyzers, and related products. Fresenius Medical Care operates a network of dialysis clinics worldwide.
